choices.text: State (TypedDict shared across graph), Nodes (functions transforming state), Edges (transitions: normal/conditional/entry/END). Reducers control how state updates merge (default replace; add_messages appends). Compile + invoke runs workflow. Foundation for any LangGraph application.

questions.explanation: State + Nodes + Edges. Plus reducers for state merging.

questions.prompt: Messages list keeps getting replaced instead of appended. Why?

choices.text: Missing add_messages reducer. Default state behavior replaces values; for accumulating lists, need a reducer. Fix: `messages: Annotated[list, add_messages]`. The Annotated type tells LangGraph to use add_messages function to merge updates (append) vs. default (replace). Same pattern for other accumulating lists; define custom reducer for specific merge behavior.

questions.explanation: Missing add_messages reducer. Use Annotated[list, add_messages] for accumulation.
